response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the entire video. Identified the first 4 minutes and 38 seconds as a monologue/presentation by the VTuber Ouro Kronii.
2. Detected a transition to a stage at 04:39, where the VTuber begins performing a song.
3. OCR identified the song title "ギラギラ" (Gira Gira) and the credits "Lyrics, Music: てにをは" (Teniwoha). Known artist for this song is Ado.
4. Performed web search: "Gira Gira Ado Japanese and English lyrics".
5. Retrieved full lyrics and English translation from search results and mapped them to the scene starting at 04:39.
response.global_summary: The video begins with the VTuber Ouro Kronii discussing her upcoming birthday merchandise, including a happi, button badge, oshi bag, and plushie, followed by an announcement about her first physical EP titled "Way2U". The video concludes with a musical performance of the song "Gira Gira" (originally by Ado) by Ouro Kronii.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii presents various merchandise items (happi, button badge, bag, keychain, EP).
Ouro Kronii performs the song "Gira Gira" on a stage. Song title and credits appear on-screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, truly, what a wonderful world
And so, once again today, my own unsightliness confuses me
And yet, this feeling of wanting to be loved by another
Is what makes me suffer
Ugly, honestly, my face is as if
I'm a night wolf, glaring at the world
I'm confused, dazzled, glaring
I'm confused, dazzled, glaring
Give up
Full of flowers (glaring)
I can't stay as I am
Anyone and everyone
What a wonderful world!
